essence: Responds to environmental hazards, chemical spills, and contamination incidents to protect people, wildlife, and ecosystems.

identity.title: Environmental Services Technician (Hazardous Materials / Spill Response)
identity.summary: Handles hazardous materials, responds to spills, contains contamination, and supports environmental protection and cleanup operations.

salary.notes: Specialists in chemical response, industrial sites, or emergency hazmat teams can exceed £45k-£55k+.

qualifications: Knowledge of spill response and containment procedures
Understanding of environmental regulations and waste protocols
Ability to use PPE, monitoring equipment, and cleanup tools

lifestyle.description: Environmental services technicians respond to chemical spills, contamination incidents, and hazardous waste issues. Work includes containment, cleanup, sampling, and safe disposal. The role is physical, safety‑critical, and often involves on‑call duties. It suits individuals who enjoy technical hands‑on work, environmental protection, and high‑responsibility tasks.

habits: Follows strict hazmat and PPE procedures
Documents incidents and cleanup steps accurately
Communicates clearly with teams and authorities
